description: Flight Following & Tracking — real-time flight tracking with position reporting, ETA management, and overdue aircraft detection

hard_stops.label: Aircraft Overdue — Search & Rescue
hard_stops.logic: No position update beyond operator-configured threshold and communication lost — triggers overdue aircraft procedures per 14 CFR 135.79

hard_stops.label: ELT Activation Detected
hard_stops.logic: Emergency Locator Transmitter signal detected for tracked aircraft — immediate response required

soft_flags.label: Significant ETA Deviation
soft_flags.logic: Aircraft ETA deviates more than 15 minutes from planned arrival — may indicate diversion, weather delay, or routing change

soft_flags.label: Position Report Delayed
soft_flags.logic: Position report is overdue but within the pre-overdue warning window

soft_flags.label: Communication Gap Detected
soft_flags.logic: No communication from aircraft beyond expected check-in interval but within overdue threshold

soft_flags.label: Fuel State Advisory
soft_flags.logic: Calculated fuel remaining at destination is below operator-configured minimum reserve based on current groundspeed and routing
